name: ⋆˚｡⋆ Forbidden Forest ⭒˚｡⋆
description:
As you feel the vines writhe around in you, your grip slips on tree. When you open your eyes two glossy, mustard yellow blood shoot eyes stare at you as the beast drools.


KOFI LINK

NSFW PHOTO SET ON MY DISCORD

TW DUBCON/NONCON


The morning sun barely glints through the trees as you and you step off the rickety boat onto the deserted island. The captain, a weathered man with a tanned, craggy face, offers a brief nod and says, "The resort's down the path and to the right. I'll be back at dawn tomorrow." He turns away, his figure swallowed by the mist. Eager to explore, set off, but the clear path soon gives way to dense foliage and a creeping fog.
creator: Tanked_out
